info.title: DotAAS Part 2 | HTTP/REST | Asset Administration Shell Environment API
info.description: An exemplary API combination for the use case of an Asset Administration Shell Environment

contact.name: Constantin Ziesche, Andreas Orzelski, Florian Krebs, Bastian Rössl, Manuel Sauer, Jens Vialkowitsch, Michael Hoffmeister, Torben Miny, Sebastian Bader, Marko Ristin, Nico Braunisch

protocol.description: Allows access through http and https (recommended)

host_name.description: Hostname of server hosting the api

port.description: 80 is default for http, 443 for https

parameters.name: assetIds
parameters.description: A list of specific Asset identifiers

parameters.name: idShort
parameters.description: The Asset Administration Shell’s IdShort

default.description: Default error handling for unmentioned status codes

parameters.description: The Asset Administration Shells' unique ids (UTF8-BASE64-URL-encoded)

parameters.description: The Submodels' unique ids (UTF8-BASE64-URL-encoded)

parameters.name: includeConceptDescriptions
parameters.description: Include Concept Descriptions?

default.description: Default error handling for unmentioned status codes

Level.name: level
Level.description: Determines the structural depth of the respective resource content
